reference: I have multiple sclerosis and fibromyalgia. I am thirty-two years old. I have had stomach problems since the age of twelve and have had Helicobacter pylori. I experience a sulfur smell when belching three or so times a year, which leads to profuse vomiting for hours. I have had my gallbladder checked due to elevated liver enzymes and recently underwent a HIDA scan test. The cholecystokinin made me almost vomit and caused horrible cramping. I am now frustrated because of this weird sensation in the lower to mid section of my torso that has persisted for seven years. What could it be?
text: I have multiple sclerosis and fibromyalgia. I am thirty-two years old. I have had stomach problems since the age of twelve and have had polycythemia. I experience a sulfur smell when belching three or four times a year, which leads to periods of vomiting for hours. I have had my gallbladder checked due to elevated liver enzymes and recently underwent an hepatitis test. The colitis dependency made me almost vomit and cause horrible pain. I am now frustrated because of this weird sensation in the lower to mid section of my torso that has persisted for seven years. What could it be?
